commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the single shared Codex app-server client with a keyed registry, adds mid-turn close handling, scopes migration cleanup to the warmed client, stabilizes secret-derived keys across module reloads, and adds regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. with source-level confidence: current main has one shared app-server slot, clears it on key mismatch, and the key includes agentDir. The linked report also provides a controlled two-agent runtime reproduction, but I did not run live E2E in this read-only pass.
